title: Sully Sullenberger, pilot of 'Miracle on the Hudson' announces Alzheimer's diagnosis
summary: Sullenberger is known for safely landing a US Airways plane in the Hudson River after both engines were disabled by bird strikes in 2009. All passengers on the plane survived.
